reading_type.description: The reading type the plan is preparing to synthesize.

tradition_mode.description: The interpretive tradition or blend requested by the user.

tone.description: The requested voice for the final reading.

focus.description: The user's explicit question or the inferred interpretive focus.

primary_factors.description: Chart factors that should carry the most interpretive weight.

secondary_factors.description: Supporting chart factors to integrate after the primary factors.

resources_to_load.description: Bundled reference files or modules needed before synthesis.

missing_resources.description: Exact or ideal resources that do not exist and the broader fallback resources to use instead.

weighting_notes.description: Notes explaining why some factors outrank others for this reading.

synthesis_warnings.description: Uncertainty, scope, ethics, or conflict warnings to preserve in the final reading.
